title: Happy Pet Rope Ball Dog Toy Strong Tough Fun Interactive Chewing Outdoor Playing Catch Fetch Lightweight Tugging Pulling for All Breeds 3.25"
features: Designed for Durability - Tough and resilient construction, perfect for withstanding intense chewing and rough play.
Promotes Dental Health - Ideal for keeping teeth and gums healthy, encouraging natural chewing behaviour.
Interactive Play - Perfect for outdoor fetch, tug-of-war and interactive play, fostering active engagement.
Vibrant Colours - Available in an assortment of colours, adding a fun and eye-catching element to playtime.
Versatile Use - Suitable for all breeds, great for both indoor and outdoor play, offering a variety of play options.
description: From the manufacturer Features: Material: Rubber Pet Toy Type: Ball Target Species: Dog Breed Recommendation: All Breeds Spesial Feature: ‎‎Portable, Lightweight Recommended Uses for Product: Playing Count: 1 Size: 8 x 8 x 35 cm Happy Pet Rope Ball 3.25" Our Rope Ball is the perfect all-round toy for your pet, designed for both tug games and retrieval training. Crafted from natural rubber, the ball is nearly solid throughout, ensuring durability and long-lasting use. The high-quality rope attached allows for easy throwing over considerable distances, making playtime more engaging and fun. Not only is it built to last, but it's also great for your pet's teeth and gums, promoting healthy chewing habits.
